sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1869" key="a)hqi/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀηθ-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n1869.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be unaccustomed to</tr_> a thing, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1866.tlg001:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
